page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance provides 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs, indicating a dedicated CPU allocation with 1.0 thread per core. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, requiring external network-attached storage solutions. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density position this instance as a premium resource tier designed for workloads requiring sustained, non-shared compute and memory capacity without the overhead of hyperthreading.

Given its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high network throughput, the ecs.r7.32xlarge is designed for memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data processing pipelines, and caching layers that require significant memory capacity alongside dedicated processing cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.7 GHz, delivering 128 dedicated vCPUs across 128 physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on external storage options, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Designed for resource-intensive deployments, this instance provides dedicated hardware allocation without hyperthreading. It is highly suited for memory-heavy workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and extensive data processing tasks.
